creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
There is already Test-Harness-1.20:
  http://search.cpan.org/~andya/Test-Harness-3.20/
It fixes at least one issue with the main module that prevented me
to build www/mod_perl2: TAP::Parser::Source::Perl is now called
TAP::Parser::SourceHandler::Perl.  The patch against the 3.18
(that I used to fix the port) can be located at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/patches/ports/Test-Harness-1.18-fix-Source::Perl.diff
-- 
Eygene
 _                ___       _.--.   #
 \`.|\..----...-'`   `-._.-'_.-'`   #  Remember that it is hard
 /  ' `         ,       __.--'      #  to read the on-line manual
 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
     _.-'_./   {_.'   ; /           #    -- FreeBSD Developers handbook
    {_.-``-'         {_/            #
